reward_types.vp: Victory points token of amount N placed on card
reward_types.gems: Take N gems of any colors from reserve to screen
reward_types.card: Draw N cards from law deck and/or small character deck (player choice)
reward_types.science: Place N science tokens on card
reward_types.magic: Place N magic tokens on card
reward_types.defense: Place N defense tokens on card
reward_types.attack: Take N attack tokens behind screen
reward_types.infinite: Place infinite gem of given color on card
reward_types.bonus_magic: Place bonus magic token +amount on card
reward_types.bonus_circle: Place bonus circle token +amount for color on card

schema.sectors: tl/tr/bl/br colored half-circles used to form circles in pyramid
schema.level_order: levels[0]=pyramid level 1 (bottom cost row on card) ... levels[3]=level 4
notes: Character rewards were transcribed from scan images; icon recognition may have residual errors.
КАПИТАН (#32) rewards/costs verified against rules PDF example.
АДМИРАЛ id set to 40 as the only missing id after OCR failure on its number.
Law texts use icon placeholders like [VP:N], [DEF], [SCI], [MAG], [ATK], [GEM:N], [CARD], [INF:any].

characters.name: АДМИРАЛ
characters.id_note: assigned as missing id 40; number on card hard to OCR

laws.text: Выложите эту карту в свою пирамиду вместо любой другой карты, которую заберите на руку (все лежавшие на ней жетоны переходят на эту карту).

effect.summary: Replace any pyramid card with this law; return the replaced card to hand; transfer all tokens onto this card.

laws.text: Подложите эту карту под любую карту персонажа в вашей пирамиде. За каждый жетон, лежащий на этой карте персонажа, положите на неё ещё один такой же жетон.

effect.summary: Tuck this law under a character in your pyramid; duplicate every token currently on that character.

laws.text: Можете обменять 1 жетон с любой карты в своей пирамиде на 1 жетон с любой карты в пирамиде другого игрока, заплатив ему 3 любых камня.

effect.summary: Optional: pay another player 3 gems of any color to swap 1 token on your pyramid card with 1 token on theirs.

laws.text: В конце игры получите [VP:1] за каждую карту в своей пирамиде (включая подложенные).

effect.summary: 1 VP per card in your pyramid, including tucked cards.

laws.text: Пропустите фазу аукциона. Возьмите на руку 1 карту из выставленных на аукцион. Выложите карту из малой колоды вместо взятой.

effect.summary: Skip the auction phase; take 1 face-up auction card to hand; replace it from the small deck.

laws.text: Возьмите на руку 3 карты из колоды законов. Затем верните 2 карты законов обратно на верх колоды в любом порядке.

effect.summary: Draw 3 law cards, then put 2 law cards from hand back on top of the law deck in any order.
Choose one: place [ATK] on this card; place [VP:6] on this card; or take 4 gems of any color from the reserve.

laws.text: Подложите под эту карту сколько угодно карт с руки. В конце игры получите [VP:2] за каждую подложенную сюда карту.

effect.summary: Tuck any number of cards from hand under this law; 2 VP per tucked card at end of game.
Choose one: place [DEF] on this card; place [INF:any] on this card; or take 4 gems of any color from the reserve.
Tuck 1 free pyramid card under this law; end game score 3/6/9/12 VP if this law is on level 1/2/3/4.

laws.text: В конце игры получите [VP:3] дополнительно за каждый свой набор [DEF] [MAG] [SCI].

effect.summary: +3 VP per complete set of [DEF]+[MAG]+[SCI] (in addition to the normal set scoring).

laws.text: Положите на эту карту не больше 8 камней из-за своей ширмы. В конце игры получите [VP:2] за каждый камень на этой карте.

effect.summary: Move up to 8 gems from behind your screen onto this card; 2 VP per gem on this card at end of game.
Choose one: place [ATK] on this card; draw 1 card from the small deck or law deck; or take 4 gems of any color from the reserve.

laws.text: Всякий раз, когда вы берёте карту, можете подложить её под эту карту. В конце игры получите [VP:4] за каждую подложенную сюда карту.

effect.summary: Whenever you take a card, you may tuck it under this law; 4 VP per tucked card at end of game.

laws.text: В конце игры получите [VP:1] дополнительно за каждый свой одноцветный круг и неисчерпаемый камень.

effect.summary: +1 VP for each monochrome circle and each infinite gem you have.
Choose one: place [DEF] on this card; place [VP:6] on this card; or take 4 gems of any color from the reserve.
Choose one: place [MAG] on this card; place [SCI] on this card; or take 4 gems of any color from the reserve.
Choose one: place [SCI] on this card; draw 1 card from the small deck or law deck; or take 4 gems of any color from the reserve.
Choose one: place [MAG] and [BONUS_MAG:2] on this card; place [INF:any] on this card; or take 4 gems of any color from the reserve.
Choose one: place [BONUS_MAG:3] on this card; draw 1 card from the small deck or law deck; or take 4 gems of any color from the reserve.

laws.text: В конце игры получите [VP:2] за каждую соседнюю карту персонажа.

effect.summary: 2 VP for each character card adjacent to this law.

laws.text: В конце игры получите [VP:2] за каждую соседнюю карту персонажа.

effect.summary: 2 VP for each character card adjacent to this law.

laws.text: В конце игры получите [VP:2] за каждую соседнюю карту персонажа.

effect.summary: 2 VP for each character card adjacent to this law.

laws.text: В конце игры получите [VP:2] за каждую соседнюю карту персонажа.

effect.summary: 2 VP for each character card adjacent to this law.
